articles.title: ETHA Lend implementing Chainlink Keepers to automate yield harvesting on Ethereum
articles.description: ETHA Lend, a composable DeFi yield optimizer built on Ethereum and Polkadot, announced today that it will integrate Chainlink Keepers on Ethereum to automate key protocol functions.
